subcodes.first_line: In this day the True Bestower hath appeared, and the Ocean of grace doth surge, and the effulgences of the Sun of bounty are manifest and visible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز فیاض حقیقی ظاهر و دریای فیض مواج و اشراقات انوار آفتاب جود موجود و مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @scarcity of receptive souls
